name: FairSlice Platform Economics Ontology
description: Platform economics ontology governing dynamic equity, revenue sharing, and contribution-based value distribution. 9 owned entities: Pie, PieMember, Slice, Claim, WaterfallRule, RevenueEvent, Distribution, SmartContract, License. Revenue Waterfall engine with 7 priority steps. AI Judge integration for claim verification. Smart Contract Registry extends Unified Registry. 6 cross-ontology bridges to RRR, PE, GRC-FW, EMC, VSOM, PARTNER. VP-RRR aligned. Epic 50 F50.1.

components.Pie: Venture/startup tenant — JSONB ontology_config stores business rules, multipliers, waterfall priorities
components.PieMember: Participant in a pie — role (Builder/Rainmaker/Architect/Partner), multiplier, vesting schedule
components.Slice: Unit of contribution — base currency of FairSlice. Type: Equity, Time, Cash, IP, Sweat-Equity
components.Claim: Contribution claim for AI Judge verification — proof, status, reasoning
components.WaterfallRule: Priority step in revenue distribution — 7 types from Platform-Fee to Dividend
components.Distribution: Calculated payout from revenue event via waterfall rule — immutable audit trail
components.SmartContract: Packaged validation rules and system prompts — licensable via Unified Registry
components.License: Subscription linking SmartContract to Pie — cash/equity/free terms

crossOntology.name: distributionAuditedBy
crossOntology.purpose: Every distribution has GRC audit trail

crossOntology.name: waterfallTracesStrategy
crossOntology.purpose: Waterfall rules trace to VSOM strategies

crossOntology.name: contractInRegistry
crossOntology.purpose: Smart contracts as Unified Registry artifacts

versionHistory.changes: Initial release: 9 entities, 19 relationships (13 internal + 6 cross-ontology), 12 business rules, 8 enumerations, 7 join patterns. Revenue Waterfall engine. AI Judge integration. Smart Contract Registry as Unified Registry extension. Slicing Pie model adapted for PFC agentic platform. Epic 50 F50.1.

notes: FAIRSLICE-ONT sits in the Orchestration series alongside EMC-ONT — it governs the economic layer of the PFC platform. Smart Contracts extend the Unified Registry with artifactType 'smart-contract'. The Pie entity's JSONB ontology_config follows the same quasi-OO cascade as pfc_registry.configuration. See CONVERGENCE-FairSlice-JSONB-Graph-Patterns.md for schema convergence with F34.5 JSONB Graph Storage PoC.

oaa:joinPatterns.name: Pie Member to RRR Role Bridge
